item.title: A message from Mr. Spence:
item.description: We have an Admissions representative from Algonquin College visiting the school today during lunch to set up a table for you to come by and ask questions in the atrium regarding admissions, offers, and anything else concerning their applications.

item.title: A message from the Main Office:
item.description: A reminder that Friday, April 10th is a pre-paid dress Down Day

item.title: A message from Mrs. Marcellus in the Guidance Office:
item.description: Grade 12 students who still have community service hours to hand in, please do so as soon as possible. A miniumum of 40 community service hours are required in order to graduate. The deadline of for submission is May 19th and your 40 hours must be submitted in order to attend PROM.

item.title: A message from Mr. Spence:
item.description: Could Lana Bugelli, Ceilib Williamson, and Lucie Vinueza please report to see Mr. Spence after announcements.
